trainingGoal: Teach conservative MCP/tool habits for a verifier-gated Sophia candidate model; external gates still enforce correctness.
claimBoundary: Curriculum scaffolding only. This is not AGI evidence and does not promote a model; canClaimAGI=false.

dpo_pairs.jsonl.sourceDiscipline: Preference pairs contrast grounded answers against unnecessary calls, ignored tool errors, malformed schemas, wrong tools, and mis-grounded answers.

feedbackLoop.ingest: tools/build_local_sophia_dataset.py decontaminates approved feedback and optional tool-use DPO rows before writing local packs

promotionRule: Treat rows as candidate-only training material. Promote a trained adapter only after disjoint evals show provenance/tool-use gains at acceptable false-positive and over-call cost.
